iv 
 
ISHIWI LYANTANSHI 
 
Ukutendeka kwakupilibula nokubomfya ubutantiko bupya ubwa masambililo ayalekomaila 
pamusambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo (Competence-Based Curriculum) kubeleleko 
ukukansha abasambi pakuti beshibishe imilimo iilefwaikwa munkulo iyandakai. 
 Ubusalo bwa aya masamililo ayapya ayakwishibisha ifyakubomba imilimo yali munshila nangula 
mulutampulo lwakupilibula nokupakamisha amasambililo ukulosha ku milimo abasambi bafwile 
ukwishiba.  
Iciputulwa ca masambililo cili icayangwa kumafya ayengatumbukamo ilyo lyonse kwaba 
ukupilibula imipekanishishe yamasambililo. Kanshi cili icaipelesha ukupekanya ifisolobelo 
ifyakubomfya pakufunda nokusambilila mukutungilila imifundile yabasambi mucaalo conse. 
Ici icitabo cakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba capangwa ukukonka na imipekanishishe ya basambi 
iipya iyakukonkomesha nganshi pakubakansha mukwishibisha ifyakubomba imilimo ukupitila 
mukushininkisha ukuti amasambililo yabasambi nayalolenkana nemilimo iilekabilwa ukubombwa 
mucaalo.  Iyi mipekanishishe yamasambililo ya 2023 Zambia Curiculum Framewrk ilekomaila 
pafyo abasambi balingile ukwishiba ifili pamo nga ukubombela pamo, ukutontonkanya 
mukushika, ukucenjela mufyakupanga-panga na amaano yacifyalilwa, inshila shakupwishamo 
amafya, ukwishiba nokutontonkanya ifyakusobolola imilandu, ukuibaka mu maano, ukwishiba 
ukubomfya kompyuta mukulemba nokubelenga elyo nokwishiba ifyakucita amakwebo 
yakuisungilamo.  
 Imitwe yamasambililo, imitwe inoono, nokutendeka ukubomfya iyi nshila yamasabililo ikabila 
ukukomaila pakwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyalekana-lekana elyo nokuipelesha pamaka 
mumibombele.   
Kanshi ndi nesubilo ilyakuti iyi mipekanishishe yamasamambililo ili nokwafwilisha apakalamba 
ukupitila mukubimbamo abasambi bonse muno caalo ca Zambia. 
 
Ici citabo cilelanga ukuipelesha ukwaba pa ciputulwa ca masambililo pakuti ubu bupilibulo 
bwamasambililo bube ubwayanguka kuli bakafundisha, ukupitila mukubalangilila bwini-bwino 
ifyakufunda, ukulondolola mukwanguka imilimo nangula ifyakucita elyo nenshila shakweseshamo 
abasambi ishalekana-lekana mu mipekanishishe ipya iya masambililo. Leelo nangula cingaba ifi, 
bakafundisha bali abasuminishiwa nokucincishiwa ukulundamo imilimo iyo bengamona 
iyakwafwa abasambi ukulingana nefyo bengafwailisha ukupitila mufyo baasambilila, mukucincila, 
nokusalapuka kwabo pakuti bakwanisha ukubikamo imilimo imo-imo iishili muli ici citabo leelo 
ilemoneka ukukabilwa panshita balefunda abasambi mu ncende shabo. 
 
Ici citabo cakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba capekanishiwa mukupeela bakafundisha ifisolobelo 
nokubalangilila inshila shakufundilamo icibemba kubasambi abali mu Fomu 1.

v 
 
Amasambililo yamu Fomu 1 mu Cibemba yapekanishiwa ukupitila mukubebeta, ukupitulukamo 
ukwa mipekanishishe ya masambililo yamu 2023 ukwacitilwe neciputulwa ca masambililo.  Uyu 
mulimo wakupitulukamo waletelwe pamilandu iyingi nencenshi ishingi isho ishakabiile nganshi 
ukupilibula amasambililo ukufuma mufyo abasambi baleishiba: Outcome-Based Curriculum 
(OBC) ukuya kunshila iipya iyakukansha abasambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo: 
Competence-Based Curriculum (CBC). 
 
Uku kupituluka mu masambililo nakabili kwabeleleko pamulandu wakufwaya inshila yakukana 
peelafye abaana amano yakwishibafye ifuntu epela leelo ukubapeela na ubwishibilo pafyo 
bacindikakisha, ukukwata imbela iyisuma nokwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyo bengalabomba 
namubuumi bwabo ilyo bapwisha amasukulu yabo nangula ilyo bapwisha amasambilil yabo. 
 
 
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr.) 
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

vi 
 
UKUTASHA 
Ici citabo cakubomfya pakukafunda Icibemba mu Fomu 1 catumbuka mukubimbamo 
nokubombesha apakalamba ukwa bantu abengi aba muciputulwa ca masambililo elyo nabambi 
abashaba muli ici ciputulwa. Kwali ukufwailisha nikwipushanya apakalamba kutubungwe twamu 
caalo utwalekana-lekana na kubantu abalekana-lekana pakwishiba itontonkanyo lyabo palubali lwa 
ubu bupilibulo bwamasambililo ukulolekesha pamasambililo yakale elyo nemipekanishishe ya 
ndakai. 
Iciputulwa ca masambililo ciletasha apakalamba bonse abasendelemo ulubali muli uyu mulimo 
pamilangwe yabo iyo babiikilemo mukupanga ici citabo ca mifundile ya Cibemba ku basambi 
abali mu Fomu 1. 
Namukulekelesha ndepeela ukutasha nganshi kubabomfi bonse abaku ciputulwa ca Curriculum 
Development Centre pakuipelesha kwabo konse mukulemba ici citabo elyo nopekanya 
nokupwishishisha ubutantiko bupya ubwa aya masambililo. 
 
 
Charles K. Ndakala (Dr.) 
Director Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

ix 
 
INTENDEKELO 
 
 
Ici citabo icakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba mu Fomu 1 capangiilwe ukwafwilisha ukupekanya 
nokufunda amasambililo ukukonka nemipekanishe ipya iya masambililo iyamu 2024 
iyasuminishiwa neciputulwa ca masambililo.  Nakuba ici citabo cili pakwimininako ifitabo 
ifyalekana-lekana ifyakubomfya pakufunda ifyo ifishilalembwa pali kano kashita elyo 
nokwafwilisha bakafundisha mukubalangilila imilimo iyo abasambi balingile ukucita elyo na 
ifyakwesha abasambi ukulingana nefyo balekabila pamushinku bafikilepo. 
 
Iciputulwa ca masambililo cili icaibukila nokwishiba amafya yamo-yamo ayaletumbuka muli uku 
kupilibula kwa masambililo mukutwala abasambi mukwishiba imilimo imo-imo iyo bafwile 
ukwishiba ukubomba. Ukulemba kwa ici citabo kulelangisha ukuipelesha kwa ciputulwa ca 
masambililo mukumona ukuti ubu bulendo bwakupilibula amasambililo bwaba ubwayanguka kuli 
bakafundisha ukupitila mukubalangilila ifyakufunda absambi imilimo, ifyakwesha abasambi 
ukukonka ifilekabilwa muli ubu butantiko. Leelo nangula cingaba ifi, bakafundisha bali 
abacincishiwa ukulundapo imilimo imo-imo iyakufunda abasambi iishili muli ici citabo ukupitila 
mukufwailisha kwabo nokusalapuka kwabo pakutila bakwanisha ifilekabilwa kubasambi ilyo 
balefunda aya masambililo. 
 
Kuli isubilo ilikamba ilyakuti ici citabo cili nokwafwilisha bakafundisha ilyo balefunda abasambi 
muli ubu butantiko bupya ubwa Competence-Based Curriculum, ubulepakamisha ubuumi 
bwabasambi mukubapeela amasambililo ayalingana nemilimo iilekabilwa ukubombwa 
mubwikashi bwabo.

x 
 
IFYO ICI ICITABO CIFWILE UKUBOMFIWA  
Muli ici citabo muli amasambillo mu Cibemba ayafwile ukufundwa mu temu 2. Aya masambililo 
yalyakanishiwa mufipande elyo cila cipande cili nefya kusambilila ifyaakanishiwa mutwe pamo 
nemitwe inoono. Ii mitwe inoono nayo yalyakanishiwa mufipande pamo nga ukumfwa na 
ukulanda, ukubelenga, ukulemba, ukusobolola Icibemba elyo na ukwalula ululimi. Ifyakusambilila 
ifyabiikwa muli ici citabo tafyapekanishiwa nga amasambililo yakufunda, leelo kuti fyabomfiwa 
mukupekanya amasambillo yakufunda cila bushiku ukupitila mukubuulamo ifyakufunda ukufuma 
muli cila cipande pakupanga isambililo limo.  Ilyo mulepekanya amasambililo yakufunda, 
mufwile ukulabula ifikomo ifyakufunda ukufuma mu fipande fyonse ifilumbwilwe pakupanga 
isambililo limo.  Icilangililo, isambililofye limo kuti lyakwata ifikomo ifingi ifyakufunda muli ifi 
fipande: ukumfwa na ukulanda, ukubelenga, ukulemba, ukusobolola Icibemba elyo na ukwalula 
ululimi. Kanshi ilyo mulepekanya isambililo, mufwile ukusala ifikomo fyakufunda ifyo 
mulefwaya ukulolekeshapo pamo na imilimo nangula ifyakucita ifyo abasambi bafwile ukubomba 
pali cila cipande cafilekabilwa ukwishiba.  Eico kanshi isambililo limo kuti lyakwata ifilekabilwa 
ukwishiba ifingi ukucila pali cimofye. 
Nomba mulingile ukusala icipande icilingile ukupeeleshapo inshita iikalamba mwebene.  Nakabili 
ifyakucita ifyapekanishiwa pali cila ifilekabilwa ukwishiba tefyakupwisha mwisambililo limofye 
iyo.  Ifi ifyakucita kuti fyabombwa mumasambililo ayalekana – lekana ukulingana nefyo 
mupekenye.

xi 
 
INSHILA YAMIFUNDILE IYABIIKWAMO 
Lyonse ilyo mulefunda, mulingile ukubomfya nokukonka inshila shakufundilamo abasambi 
ishalekana-lekana. Kanshi kuti mwabomfya inshila shimo pali ishi:  
 Ukupanga utusela (Role-play) 
 Ukubomba imilimo yalekana-lekana ukupitila mukwangala utusela (play activities/ drama) 
 Ukufwailisha ifishinka pamilandu iyalekana-lekana (Research) 
 Ukusambilila ukupitila mukulanshanya (discussions) 
 Ukusambilila ukupitila mukufwaya nokusanga ifishinka pamilandu iyalekana-lekana 
(discovery) 
 Ukulemba utumalyashi utwiipi (short stories 
 Ukubomfya kompyuta mukupanga amalyashi, utusela nama poyemu 
Ukulundapo, kuli notumisango utunsela-nsela natumbi utwamifundile uto kafundisha alingile 
ukubomfwa pakuti akwanishe ukufunda abasambi abalekana-lekana abasangwa mu kalasi intu 
afundamo. Bakafundisha baalishiba utu tunsela-nsela utwingi ukulingana nefyo baakanshiwa 
mumasambililo yabo kuma college.

ICIPANDE 1:  UKULANSHANYA                   
Ubulondoloshi: Muli ici Cipande muli ukutalikana pamutwe upeelwe.  Abasambi baleenekelwa 
ukumona ukuti balanda bwino ifikomo. Kabili balekabilwa ukulondolola bwino amashiwi 
ayapeelwa. Mumutwe umo wine muli ukubelenga na ukumfwikisha elyo panuma bafwile 
ukwasuka ameepusho ayalekana-lekana. Kabili bakapeelwa inshita yakubelenga mukwikatisha 
ishiwi elyo na ukumona ukuti balebelenga ukwabula ukutamantama. Muli amasambililo yambi 
ayali pa kulemba umulandu ukulingana na umutwe uupeelwe, Ukusoboolola Icibemba ukuli pa 
mifundile yapamisango yamashiwi ayeetwa ‘banauni’ elyo na insoselo nga umusango nangu 
inshila yakusoselamo amashiwi aya mano munshita iyinono ukwabula ukuposa inshita 
mukulondolola. Napakulekelesha kuli ukulanshanya pa mipilibwile ya ndimi.

i.

Umulandu 
 Bane ine ukupeepa fwaka kwandi natampilefye ilyo naali mucisa muli maayo. Bamaayo na 
bataata baleenwa ubwalwa nga amakabe ico icaleengele ukuti balekumana na bakapeepa wafwaka. 
Caamoneke kwati icuushi ca fwaka bamaayo baaleepeepa caleingila ku bongo bwandi ilyo naali 
mucisa. 
Panumafye yakupaapa, bamaayo batampile ukulwala umutima, amoolu ukufimba elyo 
napakulekelesha ba ndokotala baku cipatala cikalamba ica ku Mbereshi baishile bapima ukuti 
imishipa yalifwa mubongo na ukulenga ifilundwa fya mubili ukufwa. Neci cabalengele 
ukwikatwa na lupuma, ubulwele ubwitwa mu cisungu ‘sitoloko’. Elyo bataata nabo pali leelo 
balilwala kaansa yakuli bapwa-pwa. Nomba nangu caali ifyo nshasakame iyoo pantu nalishibe 
ifyo mfwaya ukuba.  
 Ku camupamba, ilyo naali na imyaka ikumi na itatu iyakufyalwa ninshi ndi mu Geledi 8 pasukulu 
pa Ng’ona ku Kawambwa, natampile ukwangala na banandi, Tikitoko Mwanza, Mapulanga elyo 
na umunandi twainike Butala pantu ewaleleeta fwaka ukufuma mwituuka lyaba wishi. Twalecita 
nga twainuka kusukulu, twapita pa fikuulwa fyabwalwa. Apa epo naishibe imisango yafwaka elyo 
na ifyo ‘nikotini’ ibomba.  Icibemba citiila, ‘ukusuusha ilungu kwendamo.’ Kanshi naleecitafye 
napeepako uwakashanga, uwakufubatila mukanwa, uwakusheta nga cungamu elyo na 
uwakununshafye ku myona. Apa epo nashininkishe ukuti, ‘nikotini’ aaba na ubulembe nangu 
ilyambi kuli kapeepa.   Cila bushiku umupu wamukanwa kandi waleenunka fwaka. Ameeno nayo 
nisotambe kukukashika. Naleefilwa ukuseka abanandi nga balelanda ifyakutekunya.  
Mwemisepela inandi naali muli kupi nshaishibe ukuti umubili wandi waleetompoka.  Bongo-
bongo, bapwa-pwa elyo na imishipa ya mubili fyatampile ukumpeela amafya. Naleefilwa

Umulandu 
Ku camupamba, ilyo naali na imyaka ikumi na itatu iyakufyalwa ninshi ndi mu Geledi 8 pasukulu 
pa Ng’ona ku Kawambwa, natampile ukwangala na banandi, Tikitoko Mwanza, Mapulanga elyo 
na umunandi twainike Butala pantu ewaleleeta fwaka ukufuma mwituuka lyaba wishi. Twalecita 
nga twainuka kusukulu, twapita pa fikuulwa fyabwalwa. Apa epo naishibe imisango yafwaka elyo 
na ifyo ‘nikotini’ ibomba.  Icibemba citiila,’ ukusuusha ilungu kwendamo.’ Kanshi naleecitafye 
napeepako uwakashanga, uwakufubatila mukanwa, uwakusheta nga cungamu elyo na 
uwakununshafye ku myona. Apa epo nashininkishe ukuti, ‘nikotini’ aaba na ubulembe nangu 
ilyambi kuli kapeepa.   Cila bushiku umupu wamukanwa kandi waleenunka fwaka. Ameeno nayo 
nisotambe kukukashika. Naleefilwa ukuseka abanandi nga balelanda ifyakutekunya.

 Mulenga ati, ‘Yangu misisi, mushelefye mweka mumushi watalala ifi? Nga abantu bonse

Umulandu 
Batiila ‘ukushili shibulimi ninshi kuli insala kabili na ubuyo ninshi takuli’. Ubulimi bwaba 
ubwalekana-lekana mwana wandi. Bambi nibakalima wamataba, insunsami, imbalala nafimbipo 
ifilimwa ifileta ubukumu ku mulimi onse. Abengi bashibulimi mucaalo ca Zambia baitumpa 
mukulima amataba pantu ecakulya caseeka pamulandu wakuti kulapelwa ubunga bunaiwako 
ubwali. 
Teico ceeka iyo, bambi bashibulimi nibakanye-kanye mukuteeka inkoko ishabuuta. Batila 
ukuteeka inkoko shabuuta kulaleeta ulupiya mukashita akanoono. Mu myeshifye ibili, na 
ukumyanga umucele kashita ninshi nashikula. Ici cilaleenga shimakwebo wakusunga inkoko 
ukunonkelamo mukashita akanoono. Leelo bonse ubu bulimi pantu shibulimi kuti ashitisha inkoko 
akwete na ukushitamo inyanje shakupeleshamo ubunga atemwa ukushitamo ifyo alekabila.

20 
 
Pakuti umuntu akule bwino kabili uwacingililwa ku malweele, afwile ukulaalyako umusaalu. 
Kanshi mwana wandi, wilalaba ukutiila kwaliba na ubulimi bwamusaalu. Imisaalu yaba iyalekana-
lekana apali; kalembula, cibanga-nkonde, lubanga, kacesha, katapa, luungu-luungu naimbipo 
iyafulisha nganshi. Mune aba bashibulimi ubukwebo bwabo tabuputuka pantu umuntu uuli onse 
alafwaya ukukula na ukucingililwa ekutila ukukwata ubumi ubwafikapo. Ine newiso pakuti imbe 
na ubumi ubu ulemona, ala misaalu iine iyi mwasuula. Mune icisosa cipa amaano. 
Leka nkwebe mune, ine nteeka imbushi, ing’ombe na utululu. Kwena inshita na inshita ndashitisha 
na ukusangamo akanya-mpuku. Aba bonse bamunonko ulemona baleituntumba pali ndakai, 
nipamulandu na ififuma mubulimi bwa finama nteeka kabili naine emo nafikuukila insakwe. 
Bambi nabo baitumpa mubuteekeshi bwa isabi. Kuti nga watandalila ifishiba fyabo awe kuti 
wamona na uko imilonge, nkokoonko, amatuku nafimbipo uko filesenya, awe kuti watemwa. 
Batila umuntu uuli onse alafwayako akaluce eco ubu bulimi nabo bwakwatila ubunonshi pantu 
kusombola miiku ibili mumwaka umo ukucila pabulimi bwamataba. 
Mwana wandi, ukwikala bwino kano nauitumpamo mubulimi. Niwemwine ukusalapo pabulimi 
natantawila. Nalikwebele tabulapo.

Umulandu 
Kwaliba imiteekele iyapusana-pusana mufyalo ifyalekana-lekana. Imitekele imo pali iyi ilawamina 
abantu elyo imbi nayo nikwanakalyafye. Ilingi line tacilubika ukwishiba mu caalo umwaba 
imitekele iisuma pantu ubuyantanshi na ubunonshi bulaba ubwatunguluka saana.

35 
 
Imiteekele isuma eilenga ukuti cibe ifi. Icakubalilapo, intungulushi shonse shakuteeka shisalwa 
nabekala-caalo. Eico kanshi, ilyo lyonse ishishine ntungulushi shilefwaya ukubomba ifintu ifili 
fyonse shitala shaipusha abantu ifingabawamina mubwikalo bwabo. Limbi nalyo abekala-caalo 
abene ebaya ku ntungulushi shabo na ukusheba ico balefwaya ukubombelwa. Uku kumfwana 
pakati kantungulushi na abekala-caalo ilingi line kulaceefya ukukangana uko kubapo mu caalo 
umo mushili intungulushi isho ishasalwa nabantu bwino-bwino. Pantu intungulushi nga tashicitile 
ifyo abantu balefwaya bwino-bwino cipala kwati nibukaitemwe balebomfya kanshi balashisuula. 
Ngacakuti tapali umupoka-poka pakati ka ntungulushi na abekala-caalo cilafumyapo 
umutunganya uyo ilingiline utwala mukulekanya. Mulifyo imilimo yonse ilawamina abekala-
caalo elyo nabaleibomba nabo babomba ukwabula umufulo na ubutonsha pantu balashininkisha 
ukuti fyonse ifyo balecita fyakubawamina na ukutwala ubunonshi bwa caalo pantanshi. Ilyo 
ubuteeko bwamona ukuti abantu bali abaikatana mukubombela icaalo, bulapekanya iya 
buyantanshi na ukufumya indalama shakubomfya muli iyi milimo. 
Icakumwenako cimo twingaloshako cakuti ubuteeko ngabulefwaya ukuseba umusebo ukufuma ku 
ncende imo ukuya ku ncende imbi iikwete ubunonshi, iciputulwa cabuteeko icilolekesha pali ifi 
cilengisha akampani elyo nako kalengisha abantu incito ishalekana-lekana pakuti uyu mulimo 
ubombwe bwino munshita yapimwa. Ilingiline abantu bengisha nibalya beene abekala kuncende 
uko umusebo ukabela. Twamona ukuti abekala-caalo balanonkelamo pantu balakwata incito iyo 
iiwamya ubwikalo bwabo pamo ne ndupwa shabo. Ilyo uyu mulimo wapwa iyo ncende ilaya 
pamuulu mufintu fye ifingi. 
Teico ceeka, ilyo incende ishingi shapakamishiwa muli uyo musango ubunonshi bwa caalo 
bulafunguluka pantu kulaba ukumana-akapi mumibombele. Ilyo mucaalo mwaba ukutungilila 
ubuyantanshi na amaisosele kubana caalo, abakwete icuuma balapanga utwampani twamilimo 
yabunonshi. Mukulundapo, abantu ukufuma kunse ya caalo abakwata utwampani utwalekana-
lekana balaseekesha icuuma cabo mu caalo pantu balishiba ukuti icuuma cabo cikacingililwa na 
ukusanduluka. Ici cilenga incito ukufula kubantu abo abafwile ukubomba muli utu twampani 
icaalo cilakwata ubukumu ilyo ifipe filepangwa fyashitishiwa kunse ya caalo. 
Namukulekelesha, imilandu yalandwapo ilatungilila saana ubuteeko na ubunonshi bwa caalo 
bulailakofye pamuulu.

                  Imiteekele Isuma 
Mucaalo cimo ifi mu Afilika mwaliba imiteekele iyo iyalenga mube saana ubuyantanshi 
nobunonshi.  Mu mwaka umo ilyo kwali ukusala intungulushi shalekana-lekana ukulingana na 
ififulo fyabo mu buteeko, kwaliko umusambashi umo uweshina lya Chibokola uwaiminine petikiti 
lyakuba umwiminishi wamung’anda yamafunde mu constituency ya Chibomfuma. Muli ici caalo, 
abantu baliba abantungwa ukuisalila uo balefwaya ukubatungulula. Kanshi panuma yakuishibisha 
saana kubantu alikomaile saana panshila aali nokubomfya ishali nokuleeta ubuyantanshi muli ilya 
ncende. Neeco tamwali amasukulu ayengi, ifipatala ifikalamba na imisebo nayo tayalondolweke, 
abekashi bamwa Chibomfuma baalyumfwile bwino saana ukumfwa ukuti umukaaya wabo nao aali 
pabaleiminina pantu ena aalishibe bwino amafya baalepitamo filya icibemba citila, ‘Umucele 
ukufina baumfwa kubausendele.’ 
Chibokola aali uwaipelesha saana mu mibombele yatumilimo tumo-tumo uto abantu baalemona. 
Aalikwete ifwamu ilikalamba umo aingishe ababomfi abengi incito elyo aaliswile nakalisukulu. 
Umusebo waile kuli akakeene akalisukulu aaliwamishe bwino saana. Inshita shimo alelaalikako na 
bashibulimi banoono pakuti abafundeko pamilimine ingabaletela ubukumu. Ifi fyonse fyalengele 
ukuti nga aiminine pali bushicilye bwamung’anda yamafunde abantu kuti abaafwa nga bamusala 
filya ipinda limo litila, ‘Icikwanka bacimwena ku mampalanya.’ 
Chibokola aalipitile mukusala kwaliko aatampa na ukubombela abantu. Icakubalilapo aacitile ilyo 
aingilefye mwiofeshi lyakwe cakuti aalipwishe abena Chibomfuma ifyo baalefwaisha ukuti 
ubuteeko bubacitile mukampampa muncende yabo. Nakanda nakabushe, abantu baalimwebele 
ukuti baalefwaisha amasukulu, ifipatala na imisebo. Ifi fyaali nokuceefyako intamfu ishitali abantu 
nabaana babo baleenda pakuya ku fipatala na kumasukulu. Imisebo nga yawama, ifilimwa fyabo 
nga basombola baali nokulashitisha ukwabula amafya. 
Uku kulanshanya kwalefumyapo umutunganya pakati kabantu na intungulushi yabo. Chibokola 
aalepoosako amano kufyo abantu baalefwaya nga aya kung’anda yamafunde. Indalama nga 
shafuma isha milimo yalanshanishiwepo aaleshininkisha ukuti abena Chibomfuma balemona ifyo

40 
 
shilebomba. Abantu baleumana-akapi nga bapeelwa imilimo. Takwaleba umupokapoka pakati 
kantungulushi yabo Chibokola nabena pantu baaleishiba ifyo ifintu fyaleenda.     
Imisebo muli iyi ncende yaliwamishiwe. Akampani kaishile mukuwamya imisebo kalingishe 
abantu amacito icakuti ubwikalo bwabo bwaliwamineko. Amasukulu yane na ifipataala fitatu 
fyalikulilwe munshitafye iinoono icakuti abantu baalefwaya ukwikala pamulilo kukutemwa.  
Ifyo intungulushi Chibokola aatekele abantu bakwe fyalengele incende yakwe ikwate 
ubuyantanshi nobunonshi. Imiteekele isuma nobuyantanshi fyaba kwati luufungulo na looko, 
fyendela pamo.

Umulandu 
Mumushi umo ifi kukabanga ka Zambia, emwaleeikala umukashana uwacenjela ukwasuka 
ificoleko. Ishina lyakwe ni Mwansa, kabili aakwetefye imyaka ikumi limo na ine. Mulupwa 
lwakwe mwali baawishi Bashi Chomba, Banyina Baana Chomba, umukalamba wakwe umwaume 
ebeli elyo na umwaice wakwe uwasansamuka umwanakashi Lubuuto uwo mukwipifya baaleeita 
Lulu. Ilingi line icungulo-bushiku baalitemenwe ukwikala panse baleonta umulilo ninshi kuli na 
intanda ishingi. Caali mwata wa ulu lupwa, ukutemwisha saana ukushimika inshimi, ukuseka na 
ukuipusha ificoleko elyo na ukwasuka. 
Bushiku bumo, lilya paya paleefita na imyengelele yakasuba iyaakashika ilya imoneka nga kawa 
ninshi naifimba imyulu, ulupwa lwa bashi-Chomba lwaikeele mulukungu lwang’anda yabo 
iyakupwa na umutenge wafyani. Uku ninshi baana-Chomba baleeipika amaboote pambabula. 
Nayo tepa kununkila iyoo. Apo ninshi naabalya kale umulaalilo. 
“Bane cino cungulo,” efyo bashi-Chomba baabilisha baalemwentula nako, “twalacimfyanya 
muficoleko. Uwalalya utwingi ewalapeelwa amaka yakusala ifyakulya fyamwikulo wamailo!” 
Awe ameenso yakwa Mwansa yaabeeka kukutemwa. Ici ali ni kalapashi saana kuficoleko 
mumutima aleetifye, ‘nine ndewina’.

51 
 
“Ciisuma bane,” efyo bashi Chomba batendeke. “Ici coleko caakubalilapo ico. Coo!” 
“Ciise!” efyo bonse baankulako. 
“Akayafye ukwabula ukubwela,” e bashi Chomba. 
Lulu, umwaice saana kalekale naasuka, “kooni tee?” 
 Bonse bapona munseko. Mwansa aimya ukuboko ati, “Ninshila!” 
“Efyo!” bashi-Chomba basuminishako. “Mwansa cafika pali iwe.” 
Mwansa aikala bwino bwino elyo atila, “Coo!” 
Bonse baankula, “Ciise!” 
Elyo Mwansa akonkanyapo ukuti, “Nshipeema, leelo ndakula. Nshakwata bapwapwa leelo 
ndakabila umweela. Nshakwata akanwa, ameenshi yalanjipaya. Nine naani?” 
 
Chomba afweena mumutwe. “Bushe… cimuti?” efyo aipusha. 
Mwansa apukunya umutwe uku aleeseka.  Lulu elyo apunda, “Mulilo?” 
“Eo!” Mwansa asuminisha. Lulu tepakutolauka kukutemwa. 
Ilyo ubwangalo bwakonkenyepo, ificoleko fyaya fileekoselako. Chomba nao apoosapo: Naalifiita 
pakunshita, ndakashika nga mwamomfya, moneka mito-mito nga mwampoosa. Nine naani? 
Mwansa awayawayako. Alolesha apeekeele Lulu, uwalemoneka ukupelenganishiwa. Elyo bawishi 
bamulolesha kwati baleemweba icasuko, elyo aibukisha. “Malasha!” efyo apunda. 
“Walungika!” E bawishi, baleetoota na iminwe. 
Efyo bakonkenyepo ificoleko na insekomo uku ninshi na icipululu cileelila mucimuti camupundu 
icaali mupeepi. Mwansa ewa aswike amaasuko yalungama ayeengi. Awe bamweba na ukusala 
ifyo baali na ukulya uluceelo. “Mailo, tukanwa tii yalowa na ifitumbuwa,” aleelanda ninshi 
natemwa nga pali kapashi.

Umulandu 
IIyo Nsamba ali umwaice, aleefwaisha ukwishiba ifyo icaalo abasungu abakuulile minshoni 
bafumineko caaleemoneka. Ico baleeti nga baya kumwabo baaleeleta utulyo twa pusana-pusana 
utwa kubulaya na ifyakufwala nafimbi ifyalekana-lekana ifyo bashalemona mulya mumushi. Neco 
taatalile afumamo mumushi umo afyalilwe, ukwelenganya kwakwe kwaleepelela. Ilyo afikile 
imyaka cine-lubali aleesangwa saana pacifulo camapepo na ukwafwilishako imilimo imo-imo 
iyalebombwa palya. Nga apwisha iyi milimo alitemenwe ukuya mukuloba utusabi mumulonga 
na banakwe elyo inshiku shimbi baalelunga utuuni na ukwipaya bakapanga. Kanshi abafyashi 
baalimutemenwe cibi aleeleta umunani wakusukulusha katapa mukanwa. Tapakokwele saana 
abafyashi bakwa Nsamba bonse babili bafwa. Muli ulya mushi tamwali balupwa bakumusunga na 
kankanshi yakwe ico bafyelwefye babili.  
 
Banalume Nsamba batile baali naukusenda Nsamba na umwaice wakwe kumushi uko baleeikala 
pantu eko abeena-nyina baikeele. Kwali bamo baashikulu bantu abo bawishi baaleeita abati

54 
 
‘bawishi’. Ena nankashi yakwe baaleebeta abati ‘shikulu’ na bakashi baabo ati ‘banakulwibo’. 
Aba ebalupwafye baabawishifye baishibe. Nomba ilyo banalume baishile mukubasenda elyo 
Nsamba aishibe ukuti kanshi Bashikulu Mutuule tabaali bafyashi babawishi iyo ico ena na nkashi 
yakwe baalefwayisha bashale na bashikulwibo. Bashikulu Mutuule, ebapokelele bawishi ilyo 
baishile mumushi ninshi balifye abapungwe. Baafulumwike pebumba lya balumendo basendele 
ukuti babatwale ku Lobito kukubakoleka nga abasha. Ati batuntwike pacishi ukwali cibemba 
icikalamba. Ilyo baishile, baalelanda ululimi ulushaleumfwika. Bashikulu Mutuule ebalwishibefye. 
Baleeti lwali ci Swahili. Ilyo ilyashi lyapeseshe Nsamba na ukumuponya pamusao. Lyaleetele 
ameepusho ayengi mumutwe wakwe ayashayasukwa ukufika na kuli leelo.  
Ukwikala na beena-nyina kwa sambilishe Nsamba isambililo ilikalamba pamikalile yamucaalo. 
Asambilile ifyakwikala nabantu mulupwa abalekana-lekana abamisango iyapusana ukwabula 
ubwafya ubuli bonse pantu nakuba ali uwacenjela kabili aleesambilila imilimo bwangu. Kabili 
asambilile na ukuti ulupwa tee bafyashi boobe epela, nabeena mupalamano nabo kuti baaba 
luupwa loobe nga uleumfwana nabo bwino. Ilyo ali na myaka amakumi yatatu abasungu baapitile 
mumushi na ukumusenda pamo nabalumendo bambi ukuya kukulwa inkondo ya ku Bulaya. 
Aashile abakashi na baana.  Panuma yamyaka ikumi aalibwele kumushi asangile na baana 
baalikula. Ilyo abwelele umwine ailaile ukuti abaana bakwe bonse aali na ukubatuma kusukulu 
bakasambilile ukulemba na ukubelenga nangu cakuti umwine taasambiliile. Alimwene kunkondo 
ifyo abaishibe ukubelenga baleesungwa bwino. Naciine abaana bakwe bapwisishe amasukulu 
yapamuulu na ukwingila amacito mukalaale. 
Ameepusho: 
1. Cinshi calengele Nsamba ukulaelenganya ifyo ku Bulaya kwalemoneka? 
2. Bushe Nsamba aishibe shani ukuti bawishi tabaakwete ulupwa muli ulya mushi? 
3. Nga cakuti wali niwe Nsamba nga waumfwile shani panuma yakukweba ukuti walafuma 
mumushi waakuliile?  
4. Amashiwi yakuti ‘ukusukulusha mukanwa yaleepilibula ukuti’_______________________ 
5. Masambililonshi Nsamba asambilile twasanga muli uyu mulandu?

Umulandu 
Amasambililo yalicindama saana mubwikashi bwabantu, batiila amasambililo eyekafye 
ayakwata amaka yakulinganya imikalile yabantu. Temulandu na uko umuntu afyalilwa, uko 
akulila, ululimi alanda, inkanda akwata ngacakuti asambilila ubumi bwakwe na ubwalupwa 
lwakwe bulawaminako kabili abantu balatumpuluka. Ngacakuti umwana afika 
pamushinku wakwingila isukulu abafyashi nelyo abamusunga bafwile bashininkisha ukuti 
ayamba ukuya kusukulu, teemulandu mwanakashi nelyo mwaume. Umwana umwanakashi 
nao wine nga aalisambilile kuti ubumi bwakwe bwawaminako pamofye na ubwalupwa 
lwakwe. Kabili baatila nga wasambilisha umwana umwanakashi ninshi wasambilisha 
umushi onse. Na ici, nipamulandu wakutiila abanakashi ebanyinefwe kabili ebanankoko 
cifukatila baana. Filya fine bekatanya indupwa efyo na ubunonshi bwingesa palupwa nga 
cakuti abafyashi baalitwele abaana abanakashi kusukulu na ukubaleka baasambilila ukufika 
kumasukulu ya pamuulu, pamo nga koleji na univesiti. Abeene ilyo baasambilila

57 
 
tabakaleelomba-lomba ulupiya na ukuisansha mumibele iingaleta ubusanso pabuumi 
bwabo. 
 
Abaana abaume nabo beene baleekabilwa ukucincishiwa ukutantalilako mukusambilila 
mpaka baafika ku makoleji nakuma univesiti. Tekuleekela isukulu pakati na ukuupa. Ilyo 
basambilila nabo beene indupwa shabo shikatumpuluka pantu bakeeshiba ifyakuipangila 
ulupiya nalimo na ukwisulafye na utwampani nga tabeengile incito yamuofeshi. 
Amasambililo yabo yakabafwa ukusunga indupwa shabo bwino pakusakamana ukuti 
abaana baabo na baalupwa lwabo nabo baaya kusukulu pakuti imikalilile yalupwa 
ileelunduluka. Ico nga caalicitiike amafya yakubulilwa indalama kuti yaceepako pantu 
abengi mulupwa baleeipangila ulupiya kabili kuti cafumyapo nakapatulula kesako 
mundupwa pamulandu wamafya yandalama.

Umulandu

72 
 
Mukati ka caalo ca Zambia, mwaaba impili na amalungu ayatali nganshi, mwaliba intambi 
ishisuma ishapita mu nkulo ne nkulo. Ishi ntambi tashilanda fye pafyo abantu bekala, lelo shilanda 
na pafyo bamona ifintu fyaba mucaalo. Amalyashi ya pakale yalesambilishiwa fye kubantu 
pakanwa, uko abakalamba balelonganya abaice mucungulo ukushinguluka umulilo, na ukutendeka 
ukubashimikila amalyashi yampalume, imipashi, elyo na masambililo ya pabwikashi bwabantu. 
Aya malyashi tayabeelako fye mukusekesha abantu leelo yabeelako pakuti basambilileko amaano, 
ukucindika ifilengwa na Lesa elyo na ubucindami bwa kwikala pamo.  
Ubukankala bumo ubwaaba muntambi sha bena-Zambia, bwakucindika ifikolwe fyabo. Basumina 
ukuti imipashi ya fikolwe fyabo ilatwalilila ukubatungulula mubwikashi bwabo. Abena Kale 
abengi baaleeya kufifulo fya mushilo ku kucindika imipashi yabo. Ngabafika kulya, baaleepela 
ifya kulya, ifya kunwa elyo na amapepo. Iyi mipepele ilakoselesha abantu ukwishiba ukuti tababa 
beka, leelo baaba lubali lwebumba ilikalamba ilishinga fulunganishiwa. Ilingi line, amafunde 
yabakalamba yaleeba elubuto munshila yabo ulwalelenga abacaice ukucimfya amaafya yamubumi.  
Icintu cimbi icikalamba ica mulutambi lwabena Zambia kusefya ubusomboshi. Iyi enshita iyo 
indupwa shalelongana ku kutasha pafyakulya baaleepokelela kumipashi, na ukusekelela 
ukubombesha kwabo ukufumafye pakubyala ifilimwa ukushinta pakusombola. Pamuku umo wine 
yaleba ninshita yakukosha imikalile mu mishi yabo. Muncende ishingi baaleesefya ubusomboshi 
ukupitila mukushana, munyimbo na ukuliila pamo ifyamabwenge. Kabili ukushaana kwaaleba 
ukwamaka na inyimbo shalekonka mu ng’oma bushiku boonse, icaleeba cilangililo cafyo ubumi 
bwaba.  
Mukulekelesha, baalepanga ifyakupanga-panga ifili nga; ifintu ifyalebomba umulimo uukalamba 
mubwikashi bwabo pali ilya nshita. Mundupwa, ififyonse ifyakupanga-panga ilingi liine 
fyalesambilishiwa na abafyashi abanakashi ilyo balefunda abaana bakashana. Kabili 
fyaleimininako na ukulangilila ukucenjela kwabantu bamuli ilya ncende. Ifi fyonse baalepanga 
tafyalemoneka fye ifyayemba, leelo fyalebomba na mu mikalile ya bantu. Ubulungu bumo 
bwaletungwa ukufuma kumabwe yaluma umutengo, miseke yapikulwa ubusaka, elyo na impoto 
shamabumba efintu fimo ifyakwatishe saana umutengo mukati ka caalo na kunse ya caaalo. 
Ukupitila muli fyonse ifi, filanga ukuti intambi shakale shicili shalisungwa, pamuku umowine 
balabomfya na ifilepangwa pali ndakai.

Amasambililo na Ubuyantashi 
Amasambililo yalabomba umulimo uukalamba mukwalula ubwikashi bwakuntanshi ubwa caalo 
icili conse, ukubikilakofye na icaalo ca Zambia. Pamyaka iingi, ubuteko bwa Zambia bwalibika 
saana amaano kumasambililo, kabili bufwaisha ukupeela amasambililo ayafikapo kubaana 
mucaalo conse. Muncende shamumishi, namomwine ubuteeko balabombesha pakuti na baana 
bekala muncende sha mumishi basambilile. Ubuteeko, pamo na utubungwe utushili twabuteeko 
(NGOs), fyalibombesha mukukuula amasukulu, ukupeela ifitabo, na ukukansha bakafundisha 
pakumona ukuti batumpula amasambililo. 
Nangu cingaba ifi, kucili amafya aayalefwaikwa ukubombelapo mumasambililo yacaalo ca 
Zambia. Ubwafya bumo ubukalamba, kukanakwata ifikuulwa fyakusambililamo ifingi saana-sana 
muncende shamumishi. Amasukulu ayengi tayakwata ifyakubomfya ifikabilwa ifili nga; amenshi 
yabusaka, umulilo wamunsale, na imiputule yakusambililamo iisuma. Ici ilingiline cilalenga 
abasambi ukukanapokelela amasambililo yafikapo, pamulandu wakutiila balapita mufintu 
ifyakaakata mumasambililo yabo. Muncende shimo, abasambi beenda intamfu ishitali ukufika 
kuntu basambilila, icingalenga abasambi ukushupikwa mumasambililo yaabo.  
Ukulunda pabwafya bwakubulilwa ifikuulwa, imifundile isuma icili bwafya. Ilingi line, 
bakafundisha tabaipangasha mukukwanisha amafya yabaana mumiputule yakusambililamo.

amasukulu yabo pakati kumulandu wakubulilwa indalama, ici cicincintila ukutumpuluka 
kwabwikashi bwabo.

Umulandu 
 
Intambi sha bena-Zambia shaafuma kukale. Kabili intambi shalekana-lekana shalikwata 
ifisumino fyaibela. Muli cino caalo mwaba imitundu iyalekana-lekana ukucila pali 70, 
kabili cila mutundu walikwata intambi, indimi naifyo yenda ukufuma kunkulo imo 
ukufika kuibiye. AbaBemba, abaTonga, abaLozi, abaNgoni, baKaonde, baKalubale elyo na 
baKalunda emitundu imo iyaishibikwa saana, cila mutundu walikwata imiteeto yauko apali 
ukucinda na intambi shauko. Icakumwenako, abaBemba balasefya Ukusefya Pang’wena, 
umuteeto wa ntambi uo bacita pa kutendeka inshita ya kulobolola, uko indupwa 
shiilongana ku kutasha pa fisabo fya mwaka. Iyi miteeto yalicindama saana pakuti abantu 
bekale abaikatana, kabili ilakosha bucibusa bwabo na balupwa lwabo.

79 
 
Icintu cimo icacindama muntambi sha bena-Zambia cakuti, abantu balicindika abakalamba, 
kabili ici, ecishinte cantambi shabo. Abakalamba ebasunga amaano, kabili ubutungulushi 
bwabo bwalicindama saana. Mumitekele yakale, abakalamba balebomba imilimo ya 
butungulushi mundupwa na mubwikashi, ukupitila mukupwisha ifimfulunganya na 
mukufunda pafintu ifyacindama. Ukucindama kwamucinshi kumonekela na mumiposeshe 
ya ci Ngeleshi, ilingiline ilenga umuntu ukufukama, maka-maka ngalelanda na bakalamba. 
Ukukupepa takubombelwafye mulupwa, leelo kulabombelwa na pakulongana kukalamba 
ukwa mubwikashi, ukobacita imicitile ya kucindika ifikolwe na ukusefya ubumi. 
 
Inyimbo na ukucinda mu Zambia fyalicindama sana muntambi sha caalo. Ilingi line, mu 
miteeto, muntambi, namufyo abantu bacita cilabushiku kulaba inyimbo, kabili ifilimba 
pamo nga ingoma, efimoneka saana. Indimi shalekana-lekana shilalanga ukucenjela 
ukwapusana-pusana kabili shilalangilila ifyo abantu bacita nefyo basuminamo. Ku 
cakumwenako, imilishishe yang’oma bacita kumitundu iingi, imininako ukwampana na 
calo na imipashi yafikolwe. Nangu cakutila ni pakusefya pamo nabantu bambi, nelyo pa 
kusefya kwamipepele, nelyo pakusefya ukuseepa, ukucinda na ukwimba kulalenga abantu 
ukwikatana, kabili kulabasansamusha kabili kulalenga abantu ukulakonka intambi shabo.

Ubulondoloshi:  
Ilyashi lyakulondolola umuntu nangu icintu, nilimo pamisango ya milembele ya malyashi 
ayaishibikwa. Ilyashi lyakulondolola umuntu nangu icintu lyaiminina pakupeela ubulondoloshi 
ubwafikapo kubalebelenga. Ilyo uleleemba ili ilyaashi, ulingile na ukubomfyamo amashiwi 
ayakwata ubupilibulo ubwafisama na amashiwi ayeesha ukulondolola icintu umo cibelele. Ici 
cilenga abalebelenga ukuumfwa kwati emobali mulyashi lilecitika. 
 
Ifikomo fisangwa mwilyashi lyakulondolola umuntu nangu icintu: 
 Ukubomfya batungi-we shina na batungi-wa kacita abampomfu

Ubulondoloshi: Mu Cibemba twakwaata bashamfumu basaano, emukutiila; a, e, i, o, u. Amashiwi

Amashiwi yali mu (2) pamuulu, nayo yeene yaleumfwika cimo-ciine leelo nayapusana

Ilyo tulepilibula ululimi ukufumya mu Cingeleshi ukutwala mu Cibemba nangu ukufumya mu

2. Icilangililo: “Furniture”

Ukulundulula/ukulondolola amashiwi (Description) 
Muli uyu musango wakupilibwilamo, tulondolola umusango icintu cimonekelamo nangu 
cabelamo ukucila ukupela ubupilibulo bwa ilyo ishiwi, pantu limo nga mwapelafye 
ubupilibulo abantu tabeshiba umo cilolele. Uyu musango usuma pantu ulenga abalebelenga 
bomfwikishe bwino ifyo tulelandapo. 
Icilangililo: “Hot Dog” 
Ubwasuko: “Ibanshi ilikwaata mukati; sausage, utuminofu twanama nangu inkoko, 
kanyense, tomato elyo nafimbipo”.

pesamba uutwale mu Cibemba.

 ILIPUSHO 1: Pilibula uyu mulandu uuli peesamba ukufumya mu Cingeleshi 
ukutwala mu Cibemba, ukubomfya inshila shimo-shimo isho wasambilila. 
In the bustling town of Chingola, a young boy named Mwansa has a deep love for local crafts. His 
father was a government worker, but Mwansa preferred spending time with his grandfather, who 
was a skilled blacksmith. His grandfather taught him how to shape metals into jewerlry using fire 
and anvil. Mwansa’s favorite project was making a small shine bracelet which he decided to gift 
his mother for her birthday. The old man alyways said, “Metal, like life, must be handled with 
care. If you rush it, it will break”. Mwansa was determined to follow his grandfather’s advice. 
 ILIPUSHO 2: Pilibwila uyu mulandu uli peesamba mucingeleshi, ukubomfya inshila 
shimo-shimo isho wasambilila. 
Muno calo cesu ica Zambia, mwaba imyendele iyalekalekana. Kwaba ukwenda pamusebo, 
panyanji, pameenshi elyo na mumwela. Twalalandafye pamyendele yamumwela.  
Kwatifye filya abapamusebo beenda mumyotoka ishinoono na ishikalamba, atemwa 
abapamumana mu maato ayalekana-lekana, efyo nabenda mumwela caaba. Kwaba indeke 
ishinoono elyo na ishikalamba ishisenda impendwa yabantu iyalekana-lekana. Amatauni 
ayakalamba yakwata ifibansa ifikalamba ifyo fiwapo indeke ishikalamba saana pantu shifwaya 
intamfu ishikalamba pakwima napakuwa. Nakabili muma tauni ayanoono elyo namuma Boma 
ayengi mwaliba utubansa utunoono apo apawa utundeke utunoono elyo nashilya isha pakapaka.

Umulandu 
Abapwisha amasambililo mucaalo cesu ica Zambia pamofye na impendwa yamisepela iyapwisha 
amasukulu ileilakofye pamulu, nangula cingaba ifi abaibimba mukuleta ubunonshi mu caalo 
babafye abansokotwa. 
Mumyaka yafumako ubuteeko bwalipeele icipope kuli cilamusepela uwapwisha isukulu ukuya 
pamyaka ibili nokusambilila palwabulimi, neci nipakuti umuntu onse pamofye na imisepela ine 
baasendamo ulubali mubunonshi bwacaalo, nakuba baaleyamuku kanshiwa munshila ishalekana-
lekana.

93 
 
Umusango wakusenda imisepela yonse kuli aya amasambililo ya bulimi, tawapokelelwe nakalya 
ico bamo baleilishanya ukutila imisambilile tayafikilepo nakalya leelo ico ababeemba balisosa 
ukuti teti utemwe insalu ‘upate akapika nsalu’, umuntu onse alingile fye ukuya epakuti 
pakulekelesha asanga ifyakumuletela ubukumu. Nangula cingaba cakutila abantu abengi 
nabasanga incito, impendwa yabalekabila incito nayo ileilakofye pamulu. Lubali lumbi impendwa 
naimbi iyabakalamba cilesangwa ukuti eileima na ukuya mutulale mukufwaya ishancito, neci kuti 
camonekelafye na kumpendwa yabantu ifyo ilekulilako mutulale ubwaila na ubwaca. 
Ngatwasansha impendwa ya misepela pamofye neyabakalamba abalekabila ukwingila incito lyena 
kuti twamona ubukankala buli mukulolesha ishimpuka ukuisangila ifyakucita pakuti tabalebulilwa 
indalama, leelo nga tatukoseleshe imiseepala ukuisangila ifyakucita ukupitila mumakwebo 
namufya kutukuta-tukuta lyena ubwafya kuti buleilakofye pamulu.

Umulandu 
Mu caalo cesu ica Zambia, mwaba abantu abapusana-pusana. Mwaba abakankala pamopenefye na 
ababulisha. Ukubulisha kwafintu tacilepilibula ukuti, kulingile ukubelelela kubantu ababulisha 
iyoo, leelo kufwile kwaba lisambililo. Icikankala icakwishiba cakutila, umuntu umukankala pali 
lelo ngacakuti ailekelesha mumilimo yakwe, kuti asanguka umubusu. Abao nabo ababulisha 
ngacakutila babombesha, awe nabobene kuti baaba bakatebebe. 
Abantu abengi abakwata icuma muno caalo cesu ica Zambia, bantu baibimba mumakwebo. 
Amakwebo yene yaaba ayapusana-pusana, yambi yakushitisha ifintun ifyakukungula kumbi elyo 
yambi nayo yakuipangilafye ifintu ifyalena-lekana ukuli nga; ukulima ifilimwa ifyapusana-pusana, 
ukuteeka ifitekwa ifili nga inkoko, ibushi, inkumba, ing’ombe elyo na ifiteekwa fimbi. Bambi 
nabo Lesa abapeela amatalanta ayawama nga pali kapashi ayo ayaangusha ubwikalo bwabo ayali 
nga; ukupanga impukunya matobo, imiseke, amatanda ukubikapofye na ukupanga amaseleti 
yanyimbo. 
Muncende ishingi, ilyo umuntu amoneka ukuti, ubukwebo bwalaenda bwino, kulaba ukufupula 
ukupitila mukubikapo amashiwi yamutunganya. Na ici, cilatompola umuntu uulefwaya 
ukubombesha ico aletina ukulamusonta iminwe. Lubali lumbi, bambi balilafye ishamo mu imyeo 
yabo kumulandufye wa uyu mutunganya. Ubuteeko bulingile ukubikapo ifunde lyakubikapo 
ababombesha pakutila bengakoseleshiwa na ukutwala ubonshi bwacaalo cesu pantanshi. 
Ukwisa kubwafwilisho ukufuma kubuteeko, ubuteeko bwalibikako indalama shakwafwako bashi-
makwebo mumakwebo yabo. Ici, nipakutila umwikalo caalo onse aba uwapakamishiwa

Umutwe 1: Amashiwi

Amashiwi Ayakankala: Tungi-weshina, Tungi-wakacita 
Ifikomo fyakufundapo:  
 Ukupenda ifipendo 
Ifyakubomfya: 
 Ifitabo ifikwete ifipendo mu Cingeleshi na mu Cibemba 
 Caati uukweete ifipendo ifyalekana-lekana 
 
 Ubulondoloshi 
1.  Ifipendo niba-tungi weshina, eico balingile ukusuminishanya na amashina balelandapo ngeefi:  
-Amani ayanono 
-Ingánda imo 
2. Mukulungika, icipendo cilembwa panuma ya ishina ngeefi: 
- 
Abantu babili 
- 
Imbushi shitatu 
3. Ifipendo 6, 7, 8 na 9 tafyakwata inundwa kuntanshi ngeefi: 
- Cine-lubali 
- Cine konse-konse  
- elyo napabula 
 
4. Kwalibako na ifishibilo fimo ifibombela pamo mufipendo 
1. (+) ukubikapo 
2. (-) ukufumyapo 
3. (/) ukwakanya 
4. (*) ukumikula 
 Icilangililo: 16 + 9 = 25

100

 Kafundisha:

i. 
Kafundisha: 
 Lemba pacipampa inshita amapinda yabomba

ii.

Fwaya amapinda ayayeene nenshita upeelwe ngeefi: 
1. Akalimo bashikupeele: icilambu lupi 
Ubwasuko: kabwe, ngawantobela imbale nshakuleke pantu nshikwebelepo ukuleta 
 
2. Chanda, ala ububuntala misoka utemenwe, ukaleetra ulwisula-mushi 
3. Uyu mwaana aaba necikuku, efyali naba nyina ififine 
4. Ishi insele Chileshe aletukana, palifye abalemutunka

6. Chansa, shitala wamyako ulubansa ilyo taulaya mukwafwa umubiyio pabana-Chisala.  
 
 
 Ifyakucita 4: Ukufwaya inshita ilyo amapinda aya yengabomba 
i. 
Kafundisha: 
 Biika abasambi mumabumba

shingabomba.  
 Eba abasambi bakopolole tebulo mu mabumba yabo, balange na inshita cila nsoselo 
iipelwe ingabomba  
 Eba abasambi balanshanye amaasuko yalekabilwa muli tebulo 
 Eba bakalemba bamabumba beminine kuntanshi na ukulondolola ifyo babombele 
 Pituluka pamo nabasambi mumaasuko yalingile ukupeelwa 
 
ii. 
Abasambi: 
 Babe mumabumba 
 Basale kalemba webumba lyabo 
 Bakopolole tebulo mufitabo fyabo na ukwasuka ilipusho lipeelwe ukulingana na 
ifilekabilwa 
 Balanshanye pamasuko yalekabilwa mumabumba yabo 
 Bakalemba bamabumba beminine kuntanshina ukulondolola amaasuko 
 Pamo nakafundisha bapituluke mumaasuko  
 
Peesamba pali amapinda, fwaya inshita yengabomba 
a. Ku cibolya, takubula mukaya 
b. Mumembe eminine, asongesha ishileele 
c. Ubufumu, bucindika abene 
d. Tailya uwatensha akanwa 
e. Ubushiku, tabwenda impanda

E: UKWALULA ULULIMI 
Umutwe: Ukwalula 
Umutwe Unoono: Inshila Ishalekana-lekana Ishakwalwilamo Umulandu. 
Ifilekabilwa Ukwishiba: Ukubomfya inshila ishalekana-lekana pakupilibula umulandu ukufuma 
mu cingeleshi ukutwala mu Cibemba elyo na ukufumya mu cibemba ukutwala mu Cingeleshi. 
Amashiwi Ayakankala: Ukupyanika 
Ifikomo Ifyakufundapo: 
 Inshila shakwalwilamo ululimi (techniques) 
 Ifikabilwa pakwalula umulandu (rules) 
Ifyakubomfya: Ifitabo ifyapusana-pusana ifyalembwa mu Cingeleshi na mu Cibemba na Intaneti. 
 
 
 
Ubulondoloshi 
Ilyo tulepilibula umulandu ukufumya Mu Cingeleshi ukutwala mu Cibemba nangu ukufumya mu 
Cibemba ukutwala mu Cingeleshi, tulabomfya inshila ishapusanapusana pakuti ufume ukulingana 
na ifyo ulingile waba. Ii misango yaba iingi, leelo twalalandafye pamisango cine-lubali (7). 
i. 
Ukupilibula umulandu ukubomfya ishiwi peshiwi (Literal translation) 
Umu emo tupilibula umulandu ukulingana na ifyo amashiwi yali mu museela ukwabula 
ukucinja nelyo fimo. 
Icilangililo: “I stay in kasama” 
Ubwasuko: “Njikala mu Kasama” 
 
ii. 
Ukupyanikisha ishiwi ilyo mushakwata mu ncende wikala (cultural substitution).

105 
 
Ifintu fimo fimo ificitika ku caalo cimbi, tafingacitika mu fyalo fyonse, ecalenga, ilyo 
mwakumanya ishiwi lyamusango uyo mumulandu, kuti mwapyanikishapofye nefipaleneko 
ificitika mu ncende mwaikala. 
Icilangililo: “Joseph was wearing a Turban”  
Ishiwi lya turban ‘tatwakwata mu cibemba, kanshi twabikilapo icipaleneko. 
Ubwasuko: “Joseph afwele icitambala”. 
 
Peesamba pali ifikomo fimo ifya kukonka pakwalula umulandu. 
 
• 
Belenga umulandu upelwe bwino kabili mukutekanya. 
 
• 
Amashina yafintu, incende nafimbiko tafilingile ukwalulwa. 
 
• 
Inshita umulandu ubelelemo tailingile ukwalulwa. 
 
 
Ifyakucita 1:  Ukwalula umulandu uli pesamba nangu imilandu imbi ukufumya mu 
Cisungu ukutwala mu Cibemba. 
Tradition is an impotant aspect of life it enables people to stand for what they believe in. Though 
some beliefs may sound wiered, to the ones who believe in them they take them as gospel truth. 
Some people believe that, the spirits of parents and grandparents are able to inflict an illness, for 
example corona virus. But since the spirit which requires to be honoured and remembered above 
all is that of the grandfather this is the spirit that is most often hels responsible. Science takes a 
different root as it priotises research. 
Ifyakucita 2: Ukwalula umulandu ukufumya mu Cibemba ukutwala mu Cingeleshi 
Chileshe ilyo acili pasukulu itontonkanyo lyakwe lyali lyakuba kensha wa ndeke. Ili itontonkanyo 
lyaishile shima panuma yakupwisha isukulu. Na ici nipa mulandu wakukoseleshiwa ukwapeelwe 
nabanyina-senge abaleebomba mucipututwa cabuteeko icabulimi. Aba banyina-senge bamwebele 
pabukankala bwabulimi napabwafwilisho aali na ukupokelela 
Pakumukoselesha baatile, icaalo conse pakuti cibe icafunguluka na ubunonshi bwaciko ukuya 
pantanshi kano abantu nabaipakamisha ukupitila mukuibimba mumilimo yonse iingatwala 
ubunonshi bwacaalo pantanshi.
